REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT SOPHIE LAU, JEFFREY LAU, KENNAN LAU NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT IS GRANTED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS GIVING RISE TO MALICE, OPPRESSION OR FRAUD. CONCLUSORY ALLEGATIONS LACKING FACTUAL SUPPORT (E.G. PARAGRAPH 10) ARE NOT ENOUGH. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT EVERY FAILURE TO PERFORM REPAIRS (E.G. INTERCOM) RISES TO THE LEVEL WARRANTING PUNITIVE DAMAGES. THE COURT NOTES THAT OPPOSITION DOES NOT CITE A SINGLE CASE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Continued To Jun-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT SOPHIE LAU, JEFFREY LAU, KENNAN LAU Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint is
GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts giving rise to malice, oppression or fraud. Conclusory allegations lacking factual support (e.g. paragraph 10) are not enough. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that every failure to perform repairs (e.g. intercom) rises to the level warranting punitive damages. The Court notes that opposition does not cite a single case. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
